coreIssue: This senior Engineering Manager 1:1 is likely about whether the reorg has created a temporary load shift or a support-and-scope mismatch affecting her leadership presence.
openingQuestion: How has the reorg changed what you are choosing to lean into, and where does that feel sustainable versus stretched right now?
listenFor: whether she names one recent forum or team moment she has intentionally stepped back from
whether if she explains tradeoffs, she ties them to a specific project, stakeholder, or time window
whether she pauses or stays vague when you ask what support from you would be useful now
avoid: do not treat reduced visibility in leadership forums as a performance problem before you have her perspective
do not rush to offer fixes before you hear whether the issue is transition load, unclear scope, or missing support
goodOutcome: You and Elena have agreed what senior Engineering Manager presence is most important to protect right now and one concrete support you will provide to reduce the current strain.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one specific example of her pullback in a leadership forum and one example of continued delivery so you can ground the conversation in observations, not inference.
